text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! You have plans to run with Prez too, Tsuru?
Are you sure you got the right day—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: She does indeed. You're both in the right place.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I figured the optimal way to hone our running is
through a mutually beneficial rivalry.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We're all rough stones in need of polishing—our
rivalry will sand down our imperfections, allowing
our true potential to shine through. So, what say
you?

text_block_list.name: Teio & Tsurumaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Then I'm gonna shine the brightest!
Okay... Then I'll shine the brightest!
